use_cases: Display SaaS subscription plan usage metrics with visual feedback
Show usage limits with interactive bubble animation on hover
Animated usage indicator for dashboard monitoring interfaces
Plan tier comparison badges with progress visualization
Resource consumption indicators with tooltip information
ai_summary: A subscription usage badge component featuring an animated bubble effect that rises on hover. The component displays plan information, current usage counts, and limits with a tooltip for detailed context. The bubble animation creates an engaging visual indicator that responds to user interaction, making it ideal for SaaS dashboards and subscription management interfaces.
